fields.label: Weather Column Label
fields.name: weather_label
fields.instructions: Heading shown above the weather data (column 1).

fields.label: Fuel Prices Title
fields.name: fuel_title
fields.instructions: Heading for the fuel prices column (column 2). Prices and link URL are managed at Dashboard → Fuel Prices.

fields.label: Fuel Link Text
fields.name: fuel_link_text
fields.instructions: Button text below the fuel prices. Link URL is set at Dashboard → Fuel Prices → Fuel Prices Page Link.

fields.label: Services Title
fields.name: services_title
fields.instructions: Heading for the services request column (column 3).

fields.label: Services Description
fields.name: services_description
fields.default_value: Utilize the link below to access our FlightBridge booking page.
fields.instructions: Text for the 'Request for Services' column.

fields.label: Services Link
fields.name: services_link
fields.instructions: URL and button text for the services CTA (e.g. 'Make a Reservation').
